# orderedLastVisitedDays

**Instance Property**

An array of all calendar days represented in the web history.

## Declaration

```swift
var orderedLastVisitedDays: [Any]! { get }
```

## Getting Web History Items

- **orderedItemsLastVisited(onDay:)**: Returns web history items that were last visited on the specified date.
- **item(for:)**: Returns the web history item that corresponds to the specified web location.

items.description: Returns web history items that were last visited on the specified date.
items.name: orderedItemsLastVisited(onDay:)

items.description: Returns the web history item that corresponds to the specified web location.
items.name: item(for:)
